retrieved_result: Can Someone Under 65 Qualify For Medicare? Can Someone Under 65 Qualify For Medicare? Basic Qualifications A person must be considered an American citizen. An individual must be fully insured by Medicare, figured by the amount of money made and length of time worked. Work credits, as defined by Medicare, must be met. Can Someone Under 65 Qua
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Medicare eligibility for individuals under 65, not related to debugging API integrations or API integration topics.
